name: 16oz Stoneware HUG IN A MUG - Room Essentials™
description:
Delight a loved one by surprising them with their favorite cup of tea or coffee in the 16-Ounce Stoneware Hug in a Mug from Room Essentials™. This printed mug features the message "Hug in a Mug" along with an image of two hugging hands and a brown handle to contrast the neutral backdrop for an appealing look. Made of stoneware, the mug is suitable for both hot and cold beverages, and can be tossed in the dishwasher for easy cleanup.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
